findings.title: P-TTS gate has no passing green evidence
findings.description: The recorded gate status is failed. The restored 200 ms evidence run still ends with 1 failing test, so the required red-before-green proof is not complete.

findings.title: No streaming TTS provider was selected
findings.description: The selection record has selected set to null. Only one candidate was measured, it exceeded the 200 ms first-audio-byte budget, and the other required 2026 candidates were unavailable.

findings.title: Static state phrase pre-cache was not demonstrated
findings.description: The pre-cache record has no selected provider and an empty playback list. The five fixed state phrases therefore were not proven to play from static clips in under 100 ms.
